How's it going team? In this video I wanted to talk to you about some of the Google services and features that we recommend you use. The first one is going to be Google Drive. This provides storage for files and folders online. They give you about 15 gigabytes for free, even with a basic Google account. And you're able to share links to that to anybody. You can even share a document to somebody so they can edit it to and make changes. We use it a lot as you'll find that out going through a lot of our content. Google Drive often looks like this. If you notice you have a new button on the left hand side, you can click on that to make a new document. You can also click on that and upload from there. You have your drive, you have files are shared with you recent, you can even star a file if it's important, trash, you can rename them and you can put just about any kind of file on Google Drive that you want it to. Google Apps is comparable to Microsoft Office. There are a few different features in there such as docs, sheets, slides, forms and calendar. So Google Docs is a lot like Microsoft Word. Google Sheets is a lot like Microsoft Excel. And Google Slides is a lot like Microsoft PowerPoint. There's also Google Calendar, which is a great calendar system. It's great for organizing. Google Forms allows you to create a free form that is stored on your Google account. And you can do a lot of cool things with that. Now what's really awesome is the Google G Suite. This gives you manageable Google Drive, Google Apps, Gmail and a ton more for your business. I highly recommend you really get involved in the Google software. You don't have to buy a license from Microsoft Office, you can use it on browser, you can use it on your mobile devices. With that Google G Suite, you can set up an account for everybody on your business, and you have control over all their files and email. So if you have somebody who's no longer with the business, you can terminate their account and change the ownership of all their email and files over to you. That way you have access to it. You don't have to worry about losing anything. We'll go into some of these features more in depth in other videos. I hope you enjoyed this content. I hope you have a great rest of your day.
